return_overworld.title: Return to the Overworld after completing your End expedition

journal.title: Write down what you found in the End — a Book and Quill record of your expedition

subtitle.text: The adventure is over. This is not the ending. This is what the ending reveals.

description: Frieren: Beyond Journey's End — the entire manga/anime is about the aftermath.
The hero party defeated the demon lord. The adventure ended.
The story continues for centuries after.
What matters is not the climax. It is what you do when the climax is behind you.
None of that was the point.
The point is what you build in the world you return to.
Record what you found in the End.
It happened. It should be documented.
The previous civilizations did not document themselves.
You are the thirteenth option. Write it down.
→ Write a Book and Quill record of your expedition [check]
